recommendations.title: Focus on essentials this period
recommendations.body: Your runway covers about 2 weeks at current spending. Holding to rent, utilities, groceries, and minimums protects what you have while work picks back up.
recommendations.next_move: Cover the must-pays this week. Re-evaluate when work picks back up.

recommendations.title: Pause subscriptions you can re-enable later
recommendations.body: Recurring costs compound during periods when work is light. Pausing now and resuming later is reversible — canceling outright is not.
recommendations.next_move: List your recurring subscriptions and pause the ones you don't need this month.

recommendations.title: Tax payment coming up? IRS Form 1127 can extend it
recommendations.body: If your next quarterly is due soon and paying it would create genuine hardship, IRS Form 1127 can extend the payment up to six months.
recommendations.next_move: Look up Form 1127 on IRS.gov. The application takes about 15 minutes.

recommendations.title: Reach out to your top clients about upcoming work
recommendations.body: The leading indicator of recovery is conversations, not deposits. A check-in this week may surface work for next month.
recommendations.next_move: Email or message your three most reliable clients.
